conference.name: NVIDIA GTC (single conference)
conference.theme: Attendee interests, resumes, and registered agenda items
conference.description: One conference (GTC). One row per attendee: education, major, job, interests, registered agenda titles (text only), and bio. Matching is people-only; agenda text is embedded in each profile for search.
